reviews.review_description: It's a very cute game. Easy mechanics, clear-cut end-goal, and several levels of play that become more challenging as you go. The graphics are adorable... cartoon like, bright and cheery. The background sounds can be adjusted by turning down your headset. I understand that it is more calm in the next itteration. 😉

I started playing and thought, wow this is really fun pushing the blocks in there home spots. Then I got stuck up against the wall, and had to restart, took a minute to figure out the restart button, but I did it, so all in all not to much time. The color and animation is spot on, very well done! I love puzzles , and this one keeps the brain going!  I really enjoy it. So hats off to the developers, it is very fun to play !!! Thanks again!!!

This seems like a great puzzle game so far. You think it's easy at first but it's just easing you in to how the puzzles work. A bit later you realise it's easy to make a simple mistake and get stuck.

I do have a few small suggestions for improvements to how the game could be polished a little more. These shouldn't put people of the game though, I just think they would be good things to tweak.

1: It took me ages to work out how to restart a level as I had no idea the menu was placed where it was and I also couldn't figure out how to select anything on it until I worked out I had to point at it with both controllers at the same time to use it. I thought the controllers were playing up at first. I don't mind the system you have but I think an initial explanation of how you restart or quit a level would help avoid this confusion.

2: I noticed that when you click to start after playing previously it defaults to the levels from 1 onwards where as I think it would be better to jump to the page with the next unlocked level on instead.

3: At first I found the controls felt like it wasn't registering all my stick movements but then realised there is a dead zone between say right and up etc and occasional I found myself moving into that dead zone and wondering why I wasn't moving. I realise this might be by design but it felt a little clunky at first.

Over all it's a nice chill out puzzle game you can play sat on the sofa and over all I really enjoying the game so keep up the good work.

Great fun for all the family, young and old.
Push the blue cubes to a certain spot on the grid to clear the level, simple harmless fun.
Thanks Moonshine games, this is a good strategy planning puzzle game.

Push the blue block to the marked place. 

You have to leave 1 space between your block and the blue block, or you can’t push it.
Avoid the borders.

This is a strategic puzzle game. Love it.

reviews.review_title: Great game and dev on this one y’all😁
reviews.review_description: Ok just get itt if u r a puzzler ! The game and its developer is one cooolllll dude!!😆 I’m editing …well actually, totally deleted my less stars review when seen the response time and his willing to help me out move forward on this game 😁 hard to get reponse and help from other devs these days!!!  And had mor to come will share  them w all with y’all Asa they do arrive ! Fan of moonshine games fo shooo now 😆

developer_response.body: Pop over to my Discord and we can chat there, as I have played over all the levels and can work them out (just) on some of the later levels do get tricky, maybe I can help with your issue
